array_types.name: String_Array_Access
array_types.code: type String_Array_Access is array (Positive range <>) of String_Access;

access_types.name: String_Access
access_types.code: type String_Access is access constant String;

subprograms.name: Append
subprograms.code:
procedure Append (Result : in out Util.Strings.Builders.Builder;
                  Item : in String_Access)

subprograms.name: Format
subprograms.code:
function Format (Message : in String;
                 Arg1    : in String) return String

subprograms.name: Format
Format
Format

generic_instantiations.name: Format
generic_instantiations.code:
procedure Format is
   new Util.Strings.Builders.Format (Value      => String_Access,
                                     Value_List => String_Array_Access,
                                     Append     => Append);
